allow: Bash(sqlite3 local.db "INSERT INTO users \(id, name, email, email_verified, password_hash, tier\) VALUES \('admin-001', 'Ardika Yudha', 'ardika.yudha08@gmail.com', 1, 'Admin123', 'Pro'\);")

Bash(sqlite3 local.db "INSERT INTO users \(id, name, email, email_verified, password_hash, tier\) VALUES \('admin-001', 'Ardika Yudha', 'ardika.yudha08@gmail.com', 1, 'Admin123', 'Pro'\); INSERT INTO accounts \(id, user_id, account_id, provider_id, password\) VALUES \('acc-admin-001', 'admin-001', 'ardika.yudha08@gmail.com', 'credential', 'Admin123'\);")
Bash(sqlite3 -header -column local.db "SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, u.tier FROM users u;")
Bash(sqlite3 -header -column local.db "SELECT id, user_id, account_id, provider_id FROM accounts;")
Bash(sqlite3 local.db 'UPDATE accounts SET password = '\\''$2b$10$UkyuSJlAd.pbCVN3OYhF9eWKhV07QNDthbZZrrDx7lvLmU5Zbsk4C'\\'' WHERE user_id = '\\''admin-001'\\'';')
Bash(sqlite3 -header -column local.db "SELECT id, user_id, substr\(password, 1, 20\) as password FROM accounts WHERE user_id = 'admin-001';")

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column local.db "SELECT u.id, u.name, u.email, a.account_id, a.provider_id, substr\(u.password_hash, 1, 20\) as user_hash, substr\(a.password, 1, 20\) as acct_pwd FROM users u LEFT JOIN accounts a ON u.id = a.user_id WHERE u.email = 'ardika.yudha08@gmail.com';")
